data.name: Lilialette's Hustle: Getting My Hands Dirty to Save My Guild
data.detailed_description:
Lilialette is living her best life: she's well-respected as a guild receptionist, but because the branch office she works at is in the countryside, she barely has any work to do. Unfortunately for her, this cushy job might be gone soon. The Adventurer's Guild is planning to consolidate the branches in the region to the busiest office. If that happens, Lilialette's workplace, the Elst Village office, will shut down, leaving her out of a job!

Thankfully, all hope is not yet lost! The guild headquarters haven't decided which offices will be shut down in this merger, which means Lilialette has time to turn things around at Elst Village! The branch office can still hit performance targets and rank up if it can encourage more adventurers to accept quests.

The Elst Village guild branch is currently F-Rank, so Lilialette will need to roll up her sleeves up and get her hands dirty if she wants to help it flourish! Accompanying Lilialette are a colorful cast of adventurers, villagers, and even other guild employees as she hustles to save her precious job!

There are two ways for Lilialette to elevate Elst Village to an S-Rank guild branch: working at the guild and going on quests.

At the guild, you'll help Lilialette hand out quests to meet the guild's performance targets by persuading and bribing adventurers as needed. Some quests can even be completed by Lilialette, so delegate the work in the way that best works for you! How you conduct yourself will also be important, as Lilialette's actions will affect her Receptionist Rating. How high or low her rating is will not only affect the guild, but what might happen to Lilialette herself...!

On Lilialette's days off, enjoy a classic RPG experience by venturing outside of Elst Village to complete any quests Lilialette accepted, hunt monsters with a companion, catch bugs and fish, forage for items, and more! The more business the Elst Village guild gets, the more areas will open up for you to explore! Just remember: even if she's not working, Lilialette's behavior on her days off can still sway her Receptionist Rating!

Choose Your Own Playstyle!

Whether you want to accept high-paying quests and hunt monsters yourself, raise Lilialette's rating and turn her into a local celebrity, or make money through perhaps more unconventional means, there's plenty of ways to spend your time in Elst Village!

A Wide Variety of Scenes and Endings

The path to success isn't straightforward, and there's all sorts of events to explore! What quests you complete will influence what becomes of the Elst Village guild, as well as change the challenges Lilialette might face.

data.short_description: Lilialette loves life as a guild receptionist, but between the upcoming guild merger and budget cuts, she might be getting fired soon! Help Lilialette get into gear and take on quests to turn her F-Rank guild into a bustling hub for adventurers... and save her dream job, of course!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
